feature: Fix dark mode in daily-view.tsx — semantic color replacements

prompts.description: Replace all hero-badge hardcoded colors with semantic classes
prompts.prompt: In components/daily-view.tsx, find every element that has the class string `bg-[#fff7ee] text-[#7a5b41]` and replace it with `bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground`. There are 5 occurrences — the 'Building your plan' loading badge, the 'Plan needs another try' badge, the 'Your meal plan' badge, the meal type badge (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner), the 'Profile editor' badge, and the 'Plan refresh' badge. Do not change anything else — no layout, spacing, or other classes.

prompts.description: Replace all accent dot spans with semantic color
prompts.prompt: In components/daily-view.tsx, find every `<span>` element with class `h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-[#b77749]` and replace `bg-[#b77749]` with `bg-muted-foreground`. There are 6 occurrences — in the 'Today at a glance' header, 'Goal outlook' header, 'Shopping help' header, 'Profile editor' modal Basics section, Body stats section, Activity section, Goal section, and Cuisine section. Do not change anything else.

prompts.description: Replace hover:bg-[#fcf7ef] with hover:bg-secondary on Recipe/Swap buttons
prompts.prompt: In components/daily-view.tsx, find all occurrences of `hover:bg-[#fcf7ef]` and replace each with `hover:bg-secondary`. These appear on the 'Recipe & details' expand button and the 'Swap' button inside the meal cards. Do not change any other classes on those elements.

prompts.description: Fix remaining hardcoded colors: section labels, active day chip, and error icon
prompts.prompt:
In components/daily-view.tsx, make exactly these 4 changes and nothing else:

1. Ingredients heading (line ~714):
   Change: `text-[#5e665f]` on the 'Ingredients' h4
   To:     `text-muted-foreground`

2. Instructions heading (line ~727):
   Change: `text-[#5e665f]` on the 'Instructions' h4
   To:     `text-muted-foreground`

3. Active day chip (line ~496):
   Change: `bg-[#edf4ec]` in the ternary active state
   To:     `bg-primary/15`

4. 'Plan needs another try' bridge-status-icon (line ~308):
   Change: `border-[#e5d7c7] bg-[#f8f2ea] text-[#b77749]`
   To:     `border-border bg-muted text-muted-foreground`

Do not change any other classes, layout, or spacing.
